Advanced Momentum Analyzer

OBV + Sortino + Slope Acceleration | 1386 assets | 2026-03-03  |  market-dashboards
Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-03 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Analyzes 700+ assets using OBV divergence detection, Sortino ratios, slope acceleration, and trajectory classification. Produces signals from STRONG_BUY to SELL with confidence scores. OBV divergence flags price-volume disagreements as early warning signals.
Today's Reading
Today's dashboard shows a market with mixed directional signals across 700+ assets. The most striking pattern is the dominance of HOLD signals (674 assets, 96% of the portfolio), while SELL positions (315) significantly outnumber BUY positions (36), suggesting cautious to bearish sentiment overall. However, STRONG_BUY signals are notable at 284 assets, and the top 10 buy recommendations show remarkable consistency: nine of them (AFK, AEIS, ACMR, AG, AEP, AEM, AGI, AIRR, and others) display V-shaped trajectories with 90% confidence scores, indicating strong recovery patterns in these specific names. This creates a bifurcated market picture where most assets warrant holding, many face selling pressure, but a select group of recovery plays show compelling momentum signals. The concentration of high-confidence V-shaped recoveries in the STRONG_BUY list suggests the algorithm detected genuine reversal opportunities despite the broader cautious market tone.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
MODERATE MOMENTUM
